sys_script_include.description: This module contains all of the functions common to the api for the Task object in tasker 2.8.5 | 2023-11-07 | mmcc | STRY0145237 - Directive - Duration code changes in the Angular Provider and Macro files to match design; : moved to Message from durationTitle 2.8.5 | 2023-08-14 | raj | STRY0136615 - STRETCH-PLACEHOLDER- Header UI Control 2.8.5 | 2023-05-11 | mmcc | STRY0141856 - Stretch- PLACEHOLDER- Office Control
sys_script_include.name: api_tasker_task
